assertionResults.observation: Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Ranges containing one through sixty-nine bins are accepted when otherwise representable and ordered.

Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: A seventy-bin range is rejected before simulation or wallet submission.

Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Inverted, non-finite, overflowed, unrepresentable, or decimal-invalid bounds are rejected with a field-specific explanation.

Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Invalid edits cannot mutate the last valid distribution or transaction review.
